description:
Name: Rumi Vyzovich

Proficiency: Logistics

Birth: Detritus

Age: Classified

Affiliation(s): Frauleins
title: Fraulein der Krieg
unit_description: A Fraulein who is assigned to logistics, particularly with rapid supply distribution. She has a strong desire to express herself and be known positively due to her weird trait of being ridiculously strong despite her frame and annoying manner of speaking, and she has deduced that people take her seriously when she goes into battle doing her job while wielding heavy weaponry without proper bracing.
